import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let parts = string.split_whitespace(line)
  let n = parts.len()
  mut out = ""
  mut i = n - 1
  mut first = true
  while i >= 0
    let p = match parts.get(i)
    when Some(s)
      s
    when None
      ""
    end
    if first
      out = "#{p}"
      first = false
    else
      out = "#{out} #{p}"
    end
    i = i - 1
  end
  println(out)
  Ok(())
end
